task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the tax documents in the specified folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\yip\ or a document viewer displaying Clara Yip's tax documents.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct taxpayer and spouse information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software interface showing taxpayer name 'Clara Yip', province 'Manitoba' (or 'MB'), and spouse 'David Yip' with an income of $65,000.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the T4E maternity/EI benefits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4E data entry screen in the tax software showing $6,500 in EI income and $650 in deducted tax.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the T2125 Home Daycare gross income and food expenses.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the Business-Use-of-Home expenses for the daycare.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Business-use-of-home section of the T2125 form showing $8,500 for mortgage (or mortgage interest) and $3,200 for property taxes.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the completed tax return to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer showing the file 'clara_yip.24t' being saved in or located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the tax software's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through and typing into the actual tax software (e.g., StudioTax), not just writing a script or editing a raw file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the data rather than copying a pre-made completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of data entry (e.g., partially filled forms, navigating between T4E and T2125 sections).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened and read the source documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot should show the source tax documents open in a viewer, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or use hardcoded values from the prompt.
